ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Fremont Bank. Sherman Hong (Beneficiary Advocate) also present. Linna Lee and Hon Lap Lee (Remainder Beneficiaries) also present.

Ms. Hall stated that she has a declaration from CPT that explains that the assets are pooled under CPT to get a discount on investment costs but that the sub-assets are managed by Fremont Bank. Ms. Hall also explained that CPT retains the $5,700.00 Medicare set aside and asked to have final fees paid. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Fremont Bank. Sherman Hong (Beneficiary) and a Ms. Lee were also present.

Ms. Hall stated that a declaration was filed and that she believed that the pending questions had been answered. The Court requested that Ms. Hall provide the Court with a brief answer as to what issues are still outstanding. Ms. Hall is to file a brief supplemental declaration at least three days prior to the next hearing. The matter was continued to April 1, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Continued To Aug-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Fremont Bank.

Ms. Hall requested a two week continuance stating that the accounting petition was just about ready. Status on the accounting was continued to August 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Fremont Bank (Trustee).

The Court noted that Mr. Hong passed away. Ms. Hall stated that they are ready to file a Second and Final Account, explained the difference in services provided by the Pooled Trust and Fremont Bank, stated that the Medicare lien will be negotiated and paid, that the Pooled Trust will keep 5% and that the remaining balance will be paid to the Family members. The Court will allow the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
